test_counts.note: Original claim of 61 tests is stale. Actual count is 121 (119 original + 2 new regression tests added in this audit). The discrepancy is due to: (1) test_ici.py grew from ~4 to 16 tests, (2) test_recovery.py grew from ~10 to 28 tests, (3) six new test files for stages 08-11, Fisher trace, and stability checks were added in v5.2 development.

stage_outputs.note: All stage outputs now present. Stages 08-11 were run in fast mode for audit purposes. Stage 11 reports containment below 90% threshold in fast mode (expected for n_seeds=2, T=32).

anomaly_1_brier_normalisation.k_calib_source: hardcoded in runner scripts (not in config.json)
anomaly_1_brier_normalisation.action: Manuscript Definition 9.1 should be updated from 1/M to 1/N weighting. Code is correct. Regression test added.

anomaly_2_pA_robust_sign.detail: The code at ici.py:318 uses 'p_A + k_calib * R_brier' (addition). Tests test_inflates_threshold and test_monotone_in_R_brier confirm this is correct (higher R_Brier raises threshold, making Mode B entry more conservative). CLAUDE.md had a sign typo (subtraction) which has been fixed.

anomaly_3_mismatch_bound.note: Updated model_mismatch_bound from 0.20 to 0.347 across all runner files and stage modules. The previous value was below the empirical p90 of delta_A, making the ISS Proposition 10.4 guarantee technically invalid for ~10% of seeds. Stage 04 headline numbers NOT re-run.

files_updated: CORRECTIONS.md — header updated from v5.0 to v5.3, date to 2026-03-12
CLAIM_MATRIX.md — header updated from v5.0 to v5.3
CORRECTIONS.md — test summary table updated from 61 to 121 tests with per-file breakdown
anomaly_4_version_label.note: v5.0 labels in source module docstrings (ici.py, mode_c.py, test files) and v5.2 labels in newer modules left as-is — these are internal version history markers. Only user-facing documents (CORRECTIONS.md, CLAIM_MATRIX.md) updated to v5.3.

fisher_trace_isotropy.detail: compute_fisher_trace() uses tr(F^(1)) = (u^T Q_w^{-1} u) * n_state, derived from the Kronecker identity tr((u ⊗ I)^T Q^{-1} (u ⊗ I)). This is NOT the isotropic simplification (||u||^2 * tr(Q^{-1})), though both are equivalent when Q = σ²I. For mismatched dimensions (m ≠ n), a fallback uses ||u||^2 * tr(Q^{-1})/n.
fisher_trace_isotropy.accumulated_bound_detail: Uses lambda_min(Q_w^{-1}) = 1/lambda_max(Q_w) via np.linalg.eigvalsh, per Appendix I equation (I.4).
fisher_trace_isotropy.documentation_gap: None — the implementation matches the Kronecker formula documented in the code docstring and is consistent with Appendix I.

run_all_consistency.manuscript_stages_vs_code: Exact match. All 13 stages referenced in the manuscript are present in STAGE_SEQUENCE.

final_verification.smoke_result: 91 checks passed, 0 failed — ALL CHECKS PASSED
